description: You are a VR environment artist building an accurate digital twin of the Apollo 11 moon landing. Configure Stellarium to simulate the sky visible to Neil Armstrong at Tranquility Base (Moon, 0.674° N, 23.473° E) on July 21, 1969, at 02:56:00 UTC. Disable the atmosphere to show the black sky during lunar daytime. Capture screenshots centered on the Earth and the Sun. Create a reference document at ~/Desktop/apollo_vr_reference.txt noting the location (Moon / Tranquility Base), the date (July 21, 1969), and confirming you captured screenshots of both the Earth and Sun.
